scripts.build: node ./scripts/local/pnpm-cli.mjs run typecheck && node ./scripts/local/pnpm-cli.mjs -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: node ./scripts/local/pnpm-cli.mjs run typecheck:libs && node ./scripts/local/pnpm-cli.mjs -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
